chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ الْأَحْلَامِ وَ الْحُجَّةِ عَلَى أَهْلِ ذَلِكَ الزَّمَانِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE DREAM AND THE PROOF UPON THE PEOPLE OF THAT ERA

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 204)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 204)
text: إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) كَانَ إِذَا أَصْبَحَ قَالَ لِأَصْحَابِهِ هَلْ مِنْ مُبَشِّرَاتٍ يَعْنِي بِهِ الرُّؤْيَا.

en.hubeali: H 14507 – Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muammar Bin Khallaad, who has narrated the following:
Al-Rezaasws has said that the Rasoolsaww of Allahazwj used to say to hissaww companions in the morning: ‘Is there anything from the good news?’, meaning by it, the dreams’.
en.sarwar: 59. Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muammar Bin Khallaad, who has narrated the following: Al-Ridha (a.s.) has said that the Rasool (saww) of Allah (azwj) used to say to his (saww) companions in the morning: ‘Is there anything from the good news?’, meaning by it, the dreams’.
